code:
fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  let values = [10, 9, 5, 4, 1]
  let symbols = ["X", "IX", "V", "IV", "I"]
  mut result = ""
  mut remaining = n
  mut i = 0
  while i < values.len()
    let v = match values.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let s = match symbols.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      ""
    end
    while remaining >= v
      result = "#{result}#{s}"
      remaining = remaining - v
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

print(to_roman(4))
print(to_roman(9))
print(to_roman(27))
print(to_roman(39))
